keywords.job: I sell food of various kinds.
keywords.name: I am the mourned Jezzara.
keywords.time: You can buy watches here in the markethall.
keywords.temple: The temple can be found in the northeast of the city.
keywords.pharaoh: The pharaoh is our godking and the founder of our religion.
keywords.oldpharaoh: He was entombed in undead state. It is said that this will finally teach him to to strive for ascension.
keywords.scarab: I am not afraid of something that attacks only my physical form. But they stay away from the city anyway.
keywords.chosen: The chosen are those who are granted undeath after a life of service to the pharaoh.
keywords.tibia: The world can be a dangerous place for the whole of the Akh'rah Uthun.
keywords.carlin: The cities of the Tibian continent have little contact with us.
keywords.thais: The cities of the Tibian continent have little contact with us.
keywords.edron: The cities of the Tibian continent have little contact with us.
keywords.venore: The cities of the Tibian continent have little contact with us.
keywords.kazordoon: Dwarves are not really fond of the endless sands of the desert. I must say I can't blame them for it.
keywords.dwarves: Dwarves are not really fond of the endless sands of the desert. I must say I can't blame them for it.
keywords.dwarfes: Dwarves are not really fond of the endless sands of the desert. I must say I can't blame them for it.
keywords.ab'dendriel: Elves don't like this land too much so we have little contact with them.
keywords.elves: Elves don't like this land too much so we have little contact with them.
keywords.elfes: Elves don't like this land too much so we have little contact with them.
keywords.darama: This continent is very diverse. There are deserts and mountains as well as a large jungle region.
keywords.darashia: We are usually not allowed to travel that far without explicit permission, so we know this city mostly from the tales of travellers.
keywords.daraman: I know little of his teachings. The priests say his conclusions were inconsequent.
keywords.ankrahmun: This city is a safe haven that gives shelter from the dangers of the desert.
keywords.mortality: The priests teach that mortality is a curse. I find it hard to understand but the priests will know best.
keywords.false: As far as I understand the gods worshipped by other nations are nothing but imposters.
keywords.gods: As far as I understand the gods worshipped by other nations are nothing but imposters.
keywords.ascension: Ascension is difficult to achive. Too difficult to achieve as long as you are still alive.
keywords.Akh'rah: Well its just the Akh, the Rah and the Unthun.
keywords.Uthun: Well its just the Akh, the Rah and the Unthun.
keywords.undead: Those who follow the pharaoh might become undead one day.
keywords.undeath: Those who follow the pharaoh might become undead one day.
keywords.Rah: The Rah is the spiritual part of a being.
keywords.uthun: The Uthun is the sentient part of all living things.
keywords.mourn: The priests say we are to be mourned while we are still alive.
keywords.arena: Sometimes spectacular battles are fought in the local arena.
keywords.palace: The palace is where the mighty pharaoh resides.
keywords.buy: I can offer you meat, ham, salmon, fish, fruits and vegetables.
keywords.do: I can offer you meat, ham, salmon, fish, fruits and vegetables.
keywords.you: I can offer you meat, ham, salmon, fish, fruits and vegetables.
keywords.sell: I can offer you meat, ham, salmon, fish, fruits and vegetables.
keywords.have: I can offer you meat, ham, salmon, fish, fruits and vegetables.
keywords.offer: I can offer you meat, ham, salmon, fish, fruits and vegetables.
keywords.food: I can offer you meat, ham, salmon, fish, fruits and vegetables.
keywords.fruit: I have oranges, bananas, grapes, and melons. What do you want?
keywords.vegetable: I have carrots and tomatoes. What do you want?

texts: I sell food of various kinds.

entries.response: Come back, when you have enough money.
